summary: Implemented all three UI polish features. (1) Compaction Divider: added compactionIndex signal to session-state.ts that listens for the existing ava:compacted window event and records the message count at compaction time. The signal is exported through session/index.ts and consumed in MessageList.tsx, which renders a <CompactionDivider> component before the first post-compaction message and applies a compaction-pre CSS class (50% opacity, 75% on hover) to all pre-compaction message rows. (2) Tool Shimmer: added @keyframes tool-shimmer and .tool-summary-shimmer CSS class (background-clip:text gradient sweep) in index.css; applied conditionally via classList in ToolCallCard.tsx when isRunning() is true. (3) Tool Status Dot: added .tool-status-dot-wrapper + .tool-status-dot--{pending|running|success|error} CSS classes including a pulse @keyframes for running state; wrapped the icon render in tool-call-icon.tsx with a relative container and overlaid the 8px dot at top-right. All animations use only opacity and transform — no layout-triggering properties. Zero new TypeScript errors introduced.
